changes_summary.backend/config/settings.py: Added rest_framework.authtoken to INSTALLED_APPS and REST_FRAMEWORK config with TokenAuthentication
changes_summary.backend/api/serializers.py: Created — UserSerializer, RegisterSerializer (with case-insensitive unique checks and password validation), LoginSerializer (with authenticate and inactive-user rejection)
changes_summary.backend/api/views.py: Added auth_response_for_user helper, register, login, and current_user views
changes_summary.backend/api/tests.py: Added 18 tests covering registration, login, and current-user flows including edge cases
